title: Can Akamai (AKAM) Benefit From Decentralized Cloud Networks?
text: Akamai (AKAM) has opened 13 new core compute regions across the globe in the past 90 days, connecting them to its wide edge network that has a distributed footprint spanning 131 countries.

title: Akamai Research Finds 65% Increase in Web Application and API Attacks on Financial Services
text: Financial services has surpassed gaming as the top vertical for DDoS attacks CAMBRIDGE, Mass. , Sept. 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM), the cloud company that powers and protects life online, today released  a new State of the Internet report that explores existing and emerging cyberattacks against the financial services industry.

title: Akamai Expands World's Most Distributed Cloud Network with New Core Compute Regions Across Asia, Europe, North America, and Latin America
text: New regions in Amsterdam, Jakarta, Los Angeles, Miami, Milan, Osaka, and São Paulo build momentum for Akamai's vision for a more modern, decentralized cloud CAMBRIDGE, Mass. , Sept. 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ: AKAM), the cloud company that powers and protects life online, today announced seven upcoming new core compute regions across Europe, Asia, North America, and Latin America.

title: Ateme Joins Akamai Qualified Computing Partner Program
text: CAMBRIDGE, Mass. , Sept. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Akamai Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM), the cloud company that powers and protects life online, announced today that Ateme is the latest organization to join the  Akamai Qualified Computing Partner Program.

title: Charting the Course: Buying Opportunity or More Pain Ahead?
text: While a host of concerns remain, historical statistics support a rally into year-end.

title: This Stock is a Beacon of Strength Amid Market Volatility
text: One stock in particular that has displayed impressive relative strength in recent days compared to the overall market and its sector is Akamai Technologies NASDAQ: AKAM.

title: Akamai (AKAM), Corero Team Up to Boost DDoS Security Solution
text: Akamai (AKAM) collaborates with Corero Network Security to enhance proficiency of DDoS security solutions.

title: Akamai Extends Its Industry-Leading DDoS Defense with Prolexic On-Prem and Hybrid Options Powered by Corero
text: Partnership will offer customers best-in-class security and reliability CAMBRIDGE, Mass. , Sept. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM), the cloud company that powers and protects life online, today announced a global partnership with Corero Network Security (LON: CNS), the specialists in distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) protection solutions.

title: Corero and Akamai Announce Global Partnership To Offer DDoS Defense Solutions
text: MARLBOROUGH, Mass. , Sept. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Corero Network Security (LON: CNS), the specialists in distributed denial of service (DDoS) protection solutions, and Akamai Technologies, Inc., the cloud company that powers and protects life online, have entered into a global partnership agreement with Akamai now offering Corero on-premises DDoS protection to extend Akamai Prolexic, Akamai's own comprehensive portfolio of DDoS security solutions.

title: Cost Pressures, Viewer Expectations Play Prominently as M&E Businesses Seek Cloud Agility
text: Akamai-commissioned study suggests increasing data volume, customer experience among factors influencing cloud computing considerations CAMBRIDGE, Mass. , Sept. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Akamai Technologies , Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM), the cloud company that powers and protects life online, today published a new research study examining the trends behind the Media and Entertainment (M&E) industry's adoption of cloud technologies.

title: Akamai Technologies' potential in niche Cloud sector earns ‘Buy' rating in initial coverage
text: Analysts at the Bank of America have initiated coverage on cloud services provider Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:AKAM) with a ‘Buy' rating on their belief the company has a unique opportunity in the fast-growing Cloud niche of distributed computing. The analysts also awarded the stock a price objective of US$145, representing an upside of about 38% from Akamai's share price at the time of writing of US$103.80.

title: Why Is Akamai Technologies (AKAM) Up 0.8% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Akamai Technologies (AKAM) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
